## Summary

Adds a clickable eye icon toggle to all password fields so users can reveal the password they typed. Applied to login, signup, and reset-password pages.

## Scope

- `app/login/page.tsx` — 1 password field with toggle
- `app/signup/page.tsx` — 2 password fields (password + confirm) with independent toggles
- `app/reset-password/page.tsx` — 2 password fields (new + confirm) with independent toggles

Does NOT touch: Storygate industry pages (static landing pages without auth state), API routes, auth logic.

## Visual Evidence

Eye icon (open eye = hidden, slashed eye = visible) positioned inside the password input field on the right side. Matches RG brand styling with cream/gold hover color.

## Accessibility

- `aria-label` dynamically switches between "Show password" and "Hide password"
- Toggle is a `<button type="button">` (won't submit form)
- Icon changes to visually indicate current state

## Browser Targets

- Chrome latest
- Safari latest
- Firefox latest

## Unauthorized Input Sources

None — no new inputs or API calls added. Purely a UI toggle on existing password fields.

## Internal Process Leakage

None — no internal terminology or process details exposed.

## Input → Action → Output

- Input: User clicks eye icon button
- Action: React state toggle (`showPassword` boolean) flips input type between "password" and "text"
- Output: Password characters become visible/hidden in the input field

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

N/A — auth pages are already public-facing. No new metrics added.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

None — purely client-side React state, no new API calls or backend changes.

## Latency Impact

None — zero network calls. Toggle is instant client-side state change.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Low risk: standard UX pattern (eye icon toggle) used by most auth forms
- Each password field has its own independent toggle state

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to auth pages, no pipeline logic affected.
